scope: PART 1 기계검증만: live runner factory + loop executor flag wiring. PART 2 실 로그인/실 playwright/launchd load는 수동 판정 필요.

claim.machine_part: harvest_driver.build_guarded_runner(channel, ...)가 GuardedPortalSearchRunner를 지연 조립하고, _build_live_execute_item가 RuntimeError 스텁 대신 runner_for_channel을 HarvestSearchExecutor에 연결한다. valuehire-search-loop.sh는 기본 dry_run을 유지하고 VALUEHIRE_SEARCH_EXECUTOR=fake|live일 때만 harvest_driver를 호출한다.
claim.manual_part: 실 로그인된 3사 브라우저 접속, 실제 카드 수확, 사장님 크롬 점유 중 양보/자동재개, launchd load/start는 자동 실행하지 않았고 수동 체크 전까지 실운영 완료로 보지 않는다.

v2.notes: Claude was not called because the user explicitly said there is no Claude budget. Manual code trace checked plist/sh/python path, default non-live behavior, live opt-in, owner-check default not skipped, RuntimeError stub removal, and no target-file Desktop literal.

failed_attempts.symptom: fake one-shot loop smoke timed out during GREEN because default owner-check entered real OS activity detection
failed_attempts.root_cause: The test needed a side-effect-free smoke path while production default must keep owner-check ON.
failed_attempts.fix: Added explicit VALUEHIRE_SEARCH_SKIP_OWNER_CHECK env support for fake/manual smoke only and asserted explicit live command does not include --skip-owner-check by default.
